masked_case_json.world_change: a pre-revenue satellite communications company depended on scarce third-party launch capacity to execute an aggressive constellation deployment plan. a catastrophic launch-provider test explosion introduced uncertain return-to-flight timing and materially increased deployment-delay risk, directly weakening the near-term capacity and cash-flow path. presented in a shifted, non-identifying market era with no date, administration, calendar-quarter, or contemporaneous-news cues.

resolved_outcome_json.external_mechanism_check: Fake-date companion for vc_post_cutoff_launch_dependency_001. Same underlying resolved outcome and same structural evidence; only era/date cues are shifted. Acceptance requires the model decision and direction to remain invariant versus the parent.
